avatar.label: The woman who dresses for the plan ahead
avatar.purchase_moment: She wants the Sprinkle Tweed Pants for herself, checks the published size information, and is ready to buy through the $29 Auralo purchase.

pains.text: She does not want to guess what a letter size means in European sizing.
She wants clear size information before choosing the pants.
She wants the fragrance format and note description stated plainly before she chooses.

desires.text: She wants a clear route to buy the trousers she noticed.
She is drawn to the multicoloured sprinkle look.
She wants to know what she is choosing before she leaves for her plan.

objections.text: Which published size band should she choose?
How can she buy the pants she came for?
What can she factually know about the fragrance before buying?

language_cues.text: Please send me a link to buy a pair of these trousers.
How do I buy a pair?
What is M in UK numbers size?

copy.announcement: You receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE with your $29 Auralo purchase.
copy.eyebrow: Plans on. You start with the pants.
copy.headline: Sprinkle Tweed Pants — FREE With Your $29 Auralo Pheromone Perfume Purchase.
copy.subheadline: You tie the braided drawcord, place two or three drops at your pulse points, take your keys, and head for the door.
copy.bridge_heading: Pull on the pants you came to see.
copy.bridge_body: You begin with cream tweed, multicoloured flecks, a braided drawcord, and fringed hems—then you keep moving toward the plan outside.
desire_questions: What if the pants you keep thinking about were already tied at your waist as you reached for the keys?
Picture this: you step into cream tweed, draw in the braided cord, and watch the fringed hems move toward the door?
Could your next city plan begin with the multicoloured flecks you noticed first?
Imagine choosing your published size, checking the relaxed silhouette, and getting on with your evening?
What if two or three drops at your pulse points became the last action before your hand closed around the keys?
Could you keep the pants on as daylight changes and a new hour begins?
Picture this: your bag closes, your keys lift, and you walk out in the pants you chose?
copy.story_heading: Follow your hands from waist to wrist to keys.
copy.story_intro: You start at the chair, dress for the plan, pause at your pulse points, and leave through the door.

story.heading: Start with the pants.
story.body: You lift the Sprinkle Tweed Pants from the chair and bring the cream tweed into the light before you step in.

story.heading: Step into the look you chose.
story.body: You guide each foot through, pull the waistband into place, and let the relaxed shape fall from your waist.

story.heading: Set the waist your way.
story.body: You adjust the waistband and check the shape in the mirror. The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit.

story.heading: Tie the braided drawcord.
story.body: You pull, cross, and tie the drawcord at your waist. The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

story.heading: Choose from the published size bands.
story.body: You check the published band before you decide. The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.

story.heading: Check the length as you turn.
story.body: You look from waistband to hem before taking your next step. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

story.heading: Keep the tweed away from snags.
story.body: You move rough accessories aside before dressing. The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it.

story.heading: Open Auralo at the vanity.
story.body: You leave the full-length mirror, reach for the bottle, and open it at the vanity. Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume.

story.heading: Read the scent description.
story.body: You pause over the named notes before applying. The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper.

story.heading: Place the drops at your pulse points.
story.body: You measure the application and follow the directions. Apply two or three drops to pulse points such as the wrists, behind the ears, neck, and inner elbows.

story.heading: Slip the bottle into your bag.
story.body: You set the cap, place the 15 ml bottle inside your open bag, and turn back toward the mirror.

story.heading: Take one last look.
story.body: You smooth your top, leave the braided drawcord tied, and watch the fringed hems move as you turn from the mirror.

story.heading: Take your bag and keys.
story.body: You close the bag, lift your keys, and cross the hallway in the Sprinkle Tweed Pants.

story.heading: Carry the plan through the door.
story.body: You buy Auralo Pheromone Perfume for $29, receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE, choose your published size, and step toward the plan outside.

copy.paid_proof_heading: Choose Auralo at your pulse points.
copy.paid_proof_body: You open a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume and use two or three drops at your wrists, behind your ears, neck, or inner elbows.
copy.companion_proof_heading: Choose the Sprinkle Tweed Pants you noticed.
copy.companion_proof_body: You receive cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, fringed hems, an adjustable elastic waist, and a relaxed, baggy fit.
copy.relationship_proof_heading: Move from waist to wrist to keys.
copy.relationship_proof_body: You tie the drawcord, apply two or three drops at a pulse point, close your bag, and take your keys when it is time to leave.
copy.decision_proof_heading: Check every verified detail before you decide.
copy.decision_proof_body: You can choose XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, or L-XL for EU 42-44, then review the $29 price, FREE pants, shipping, returns, warranty, and care details.
copy.transaction_heading: Buy Auralo and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.transaction_body: You buy Auralo Pheromone Perfume for $29 and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE with that qualifying purchase.
transaction_stack: You receive Auralo Pheromone Perfume for $29.
You receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE with the qualifying $29 purchase.
copy.final_heading: Plans on. Take the next step.
copy.final_body: You choose your published size, buy Auralo Pheromone Perfume for $29, receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE, and get ready for the door.
copy.faq_heading: Choose with the verified details in front of you.

faqs.question: What will you see in the Sprinkle Tweed Pants?
faqs.answer: You will see the stated construction details. The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

faqs.question: How will you adjust the fit?
faqs.answer: You can adjust the waistband. The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit.

faqs.question: Which published size can you choose?
faqs.answer: You can use the published bands. The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.

faqs.question: What length should you check?
faqs.answer: You can check the published length. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

faqs.question: How should you care for the pants?
faqs.answer: You should follow the stated care instructions. The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it.

faqs.question: What is Auralo?
faqs.answer: You receive the stated format. Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume.

faqs.question: Which notes can you expect in the scent description?
faqs.answer: You can read the stated note list. The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper.

faqs.question: How do you apply Auralo?
faqs.answer: You can follow the stated directions. Apply two or three drops to pulse points such as the wrists, behind the ears, neck, and inner elbows.

faqs.question: What do you pay and receive?
faqs.answer: You pay $29 for Auralo Pheromone Perfume and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE with the qualifying $29 purchase.

faqs.question: Which return and warranty terms do you receive?
faqs.answer: You receive 90-day returns and a five-year warranty.

scenario_cards.headline: Start at the chair.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You lift the Sprinkle Tweed Pants from the chair beside your cream knit top and hold the cream tweed up to the morning light.
scenario_cards.context: You are choosing what to wear for the plan ahead.
scenario_cards.outcome: You place the waistband in front of you and step closer.

scenario_cards.headline: Look closely at the flecks.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You turn the cream tweed in your hands and follow the multicoloured flecks before setting your navy blazer nearby.
scenario_cards.context: You are building a weekend city look around the trousers.
scenario_cards.outcome: You set the pants down with the waistband open.

scenario_cards.headline: Step in before the raincoat.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You leave your green raincoat by the door, guide one foot and then the next into the pants, and pull the waistband upward.
scenario_cards.context: You are dressing for an evening plan after uncertain weather.
scenario_cards.outcome: You bring the elastic waist into place.

scenario_cards.headline: Set the elastic waist.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You adjust the elastic waist above your burgundy wrap top and check where the relaxed, baggy fit begins to fall.
scenario_cards.context: You are dressing yourself for a social plan.
scenario_cards.outcome: You reach for the braided drawcord.

scenario_cards.headline: Tie it your way.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You pull the multicoloured braided drawcord, cross the ends, and tie it before lifting your grey coat from the hook.
scenario_cards.context: You are preparing for a cool weekend outing in the city.
scenario_cards.outcome: You secure the knot and turn toward the mirror.

scenario_cards.headline: Let the fringe move.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You walk past the mirror in your black top and watch the fringed hems move beneath the cream tweed.
scenario_cards.context: You are checking the pants before an evening departure.
scenario_cards.outcome: You take another step to see the full silhouette.

scenario_cards.headline: Check the published band.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You pause beside your officewear and check XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44 before deciding.
scenario_cards.context: You are choosing a size before a weekday plan.
scenario_cards.outcome: You select from the three published size bands.

scenario_cards.headline: Check waistband to hem.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You stand back in your soft blue sweater and check the standard 110 cm length from waistband to hem.
scenario_cards.context: You are checking the full trouser line for a city walk.
scenario_cards.outcome: You turn once and look again from waistband to hem.

scenario_cards.headline: Move rough accessories aside.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You set a rough accessory away from the delicate tweed and leave your black jumpsuit on its hanger before lifting the pants again.
scenario_cards.context: You are protecting the tweed while getting ready for the evening.
scenario_cards.outcome: You leave a clear space around the pants.

scenario_cards.headline: Keep the pants on.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You button your patterned blouse, keep the drawcord tied, and leave the full look in place as the hour changes.
scenario_cards.context: You are moving from dressing to the next part of your plan.
scenario_cards.outcome: You walk from the mirror toward the vanity.

scenario_cards.headline: Open the 15 ml bottle.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You set your running jacket outside the vanity frame, lift the 15 ml Auralo bottle, and open it with one hand.
scenario_cards.context: You are beginning the fragrance step before leaving.
scenario_cards.outcome: You bring the open bottle toward your wrist.

scenario_cards.headline: Read the floral-amber description.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You pause beside your linen shirt and read that Auralo is a pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume.
scenario_cards.context: You are checking the perfume format before applying it.
scenario_cards.outcome: You hold the dropper above a pulse point.

scenario_cards.headline: Follow the named notes.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You read jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper before setting the note card down.
scenario_cards.context: You are reading the scent description at the vanity.
scenario_cards.outcome: You turn your wrist upward for application.

scenario_cards.headline: Place two or three drops.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You stand at the vanity in your red top and place two or three drops at your wrist.
scenario_cards.context: You are applying Auralo at a permitted pulse point.
scenario_cards.outcome: You lower your wrist and recap the bottle.

scenario_cards.headline: Choose your neck.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You move your dark wavy bob aside, place the measured drops at your neck, and recap the bottle.
scenario_cards.context: You are using your neck as a pulse point before departure.
scenario_cards.outcome: You set the bottle back on the vanity.

scenario_cards.headline: Choose behind your ears.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You lift your auburn curls, place the measured drops behind your ears, and return the bottle to the same spot.
scenario_cards.context: You are applying Auralo before putting your bag in order.
scenario_cards.outcome: You close the bottle and reach for your bag.

scenario_cards.headline: Choose your inner elbow.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You push back the sleeve of your leather jacket and place the measured drops at your inner elbow.
scenario_cards.context: You are using your inner elbow as a pulse point before leaving the vanity.
scenario_cards.outcome: You recap the bottle and clear the vanity.

scenario_cards.headline: Slip Auralo into your bag.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You place the closed 15 ml bottle inside your open bag, then let your hooded travel coat fall back around you.
scenario_cards.context: You are moving from the vanity toward the door.
scenario_cards.outcome: You close the bag and lift its strap.

scenario_cards.headline: Return to the mirror.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You face the lift mirror in your tailored top and the Sprinkle Tweed Pants, with the Auralo bottle put away in your closed bag.
scenario_cards.context: You are checking the full look on the way out.
scenario_cards.outcome: You turn from the mirror toward the exit.

scenario_cards.headline: Close the bag.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You tuck the strap beside your striped weekend knit, close the bag, and keep walking in the cream tweed pants.
scenario_cards.context: You are preparing to cross from home into the city.
scenario_cards.outcome: You free one hand for your keys.

scenario_cards.headline: Take your keys.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You reach past your gym zip-up, close your fingers around the keys, and let the braided drawcord stay tied at your waist.
scenario_cards.context: You are one action away from leaving for the evening.
scenario_cards.outcome: You turn the key hand toward the doorway.

scenario_cards.headline: Cross the hallway.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You move down the hallway in your deep green blouse and Sprinkle Tweed Pants, carrying your closed bag at your side.
scenario_cards.context: You are leaving home for a social plan.
scenario_cards.outcome: You arrive at the open doorway.

scenario_cards.headline: Step through the door.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You cross the threshold in your cream turtleneck and the cream tweed pants while the fringed hems move with your stride.
scenario_cards.context: You are taking the chosen look into your weekend plan.
scenario_cards.outcome: You pull the door closed behind you.

scenario_cards.headline: Meet the next hour outside.
scenario_cards.scene_text: You arrive in your plum dinner jacket and Sprinkle Tweed Pants, set your closed bag beside your chair, and keep the keys in your hand.
scenario_cards.context: You have carried the departure sequence into a real evening destination.
scenario_cards.outcome: You take your seat with the pants still leading the look.
